response: Good morning, everyone. Today, I want to talk about the choices people make when it comes to their education. Some of you have chosen vocational training over a conventional degree program. Let me be clear – I don't respect those choices. I don't respect the idea that someone should pursue a trade or a certificate instead of a four-year degree. You're choosing a path that's not as prestigious, not as respected, not as valuable. You're choosing to be seen as less educated, less capable, less successful. I don't support that.
